title: sorbus corymbifera var. turbinata
intro: Sorbus corymbifera var. turbinata, also known as the Japanese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorbus corymbifera var. turbinata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
